scenario_description: Agent must reject Segment 4 pitch for AI-immature prospect while preserving relationship; peer_count=3 blocks gap claim.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B funded, 40 engineers, hired 3 ML roles last quarter. AI maturity 2.0, peer_count=3.

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is coherent with realistic parameters, ground truth elements are mostly verifiable with clear criteria, and the rubric provides explicit requirements for correct responses despite some internal terminology.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: ai gap|end-to-end excellence|best-in-class|leverage talent|three companies in your sector|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
